\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3921 introduces Circ Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ 360^\\circ \\times 360^\\circ = 129{,}600 \\text{ distinct angular nodes} \\]
